task: Fail if not using apt package
Ensure Velnor fixture config directory exists
Ensure Velnor fixture work directory exists

input:
[Unit]
Description=Velnor self-hosted GitHub Actions runner daemon (fixture)
Documentation=https://github.com/tailrocks/velnor
After=network-online.target docker.service
Wants=network-online.target
Requires=docker.service

[Service]
Type=simple
# Config + token live here (token NOT on argv: --pat reads GITHUB_TOKEN from env).
EnvironmentFile={{ velnor_fixture_config_dir }}/velnor.env
ExecStart=/usr/bin/velnor-runner daemon \
  --url ${VELNOR_URL} \
  --name ${VELNOR_NAME} \
  --labels ${VELNOR_LABELS} \
  --slots ${VELNOR_SLOTS} \
  --work-dir ${VELNOR_WORK_DIR} \
  --replace \
  --require-docker-socket
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
# Manages Docker containers + the daemon socket; runs as root (matches a typical
# self-hosted CI runner host). Harden to a docker-group user later if desired.
User=root
StateDirectory=velnor-fixture
WorkingDirectory=/var/lib/velnor-fixture

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

result.v:

input:
[Unit]
Description=Velnor self-hosted GitHub Actions runner daemon (blockchain-nodes)
Documentation=https://github.com/tailrocks/velnor
After=network-online.target docker.service
Wants=network-online.target
Requires=docker.service

[Service]
Type=simple
# Config + token live here (token NOT on argv: --pat reads GITHUB_TOKEN from env).
EnvironmentFile={{ velnor_blockchain_nodes_config_dir }}/velnor.env
ExecStart=/usr/bin/velnor-runner daemon \
  --url ${VELNOR_URL} \
  --name ${VELNOR_NAME} \
  --labels ${VELNOR_LABELS} \
  --slots ${VELNOR_SLOTS} \
  --work-dir ${VELNOR_WORK_DIR} \
  --replace \
  --require-docker-socket
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
# Manages Docker containers + the daemon socket; runs as root (matches a typical
# self-hosted CI runner host). Harden to a docker-group user later if desired.
User=root
StateDirectory=velnor-blockchain-nodes
WorkingDirectory=/var/lib/velnor-blockchain-nodes

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

result.v:
[Unit]
Description=Velnor self-hosted GitHub Actions runner daemon (blockchain-nodes)
Documentation=https://github.com/tailrocks/velnor
After=network-online.target docker.service
Wants=network-online.target
Requires=docker.service

[Service]
Type=simple
# Config + token live here (token NOT on argv: --pat reads GITHUB_TOKEN from env).
EnvironmentFile=/etc/velnor-blockchain-nodes/velnor.env
ExecStart=/usr/bin/velnor-runner daemon \
  --url ${VELNOR_URL} \
  --name ${VELNOR_NAME} \
  --labels ${VELNOR_LABELS} \
  --slots ${VELNOR_SLOTS} \
  --work-dir ${VELNOR_WORK_DIR} \
  --replace \
  --require-docker-socket
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
# Manages Docker containers + the daemon socket; runs as root (matches a typical
# self-hosted CI runner host). Harden to a docker-group user later if desired.
User=root
StateDirectory=velnor-blockchain-nodes
WorkingDirectory=/var/lib/velnor-blockchain-nodes

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
